message:
fix(build): Use fileURLToPath for cross-platform path handling

On Windows, URL.pathname returns POSIX-style paths like /D:/a/...
which triggers a Bun internal error "Do not pass posix paths to
Windows APIs". Using fileURLToPath properly converts to native paths.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
